text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Satsuki Sho—the first race of the
Classics—arrives, but Narita Brian feels some
dissatisfaction at only being able to race against
runners in the same year as her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At that moment, Hishi Amazon steps up to
challenge her, having already claimed the first
tiara of the Tiara tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Listening to Hishi Amazon, Narita Brian realizes
the significance of being able to participate in
once-in-a-lifetime races. She prepares herself
mentally for the experience.
